title: trisetum flavescens var. sibiricum
intro: Trisetum flavescens var. sibiricum, also known as the Siberian wheat grass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Siberian wheat grass include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Siberian wheat grass can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, or it can be consumed as a juice extract.
